_comment_instructions: === HOW TO ADD NEW ONBOARDING STEPS ===
_comment_1: 1. Copy an existing step object from the 'steps' array below
_comment_2: 2. Paste it at the end of the array (use the blank lines at the bottom)
_comment_3: 3. Update these properties: id, title, description, buttonText, buttonUrl, buttonIcon, notes
_comment_3a: 4. Optional: Set 'hideButton: true' to hide the action button for steps that don't need one
_comment_5: Steps can have different content for different device types and operating systems.
_comment_7: 1. byod_mac, byod_pc, org_mac, org_pc (device type + OS specific)
_comment_8: 2. mac, pc, linux (OS specific, works for both device types)
_comment_11: Example: If user has BYOD Mac, it checks: byod_mac → mac → base properties
_comment_12: Linux is always universal (no device type variants needed)
_comment_14: Option 1 - Heroicons: https://heroicons.com/ (free, MIT license, copy SVG code)
_comment_15: Option 2 - Bootstrap Icons: https://icons.getbootstrap.com/ (free, copy SVG)
_comment_16: Option 3 - Feather Icons: https://feathericons.com/ (free, simple icons)
_comment_17: Option 4 - Simple Icons: https://simpleicons.org/ (brand logos as SVG)
_comment_18: Option 5 - Use company/app favicons from their website and extract SVG
_comment_20: • Keep SVG width and height at 20x20 for consistency
_comment_21: • Use inline SVG code (wrap in single quotes to avoid JSON issues)
_comment_22: • If SVG has double quotes, escape them: \" or use single quotes inside
_comment_23: • Test colors: use fill='currentColor' to inherit button text color
_comment_24: • Keep SVG code compact (remove unnecessary attributes)
welcomeMessage: Welcome to Hope Ignites! Let's get you set up with everything you need to start your first day. The steps below will guide you through accessing your Microsoft 365 account, setting up Outlook, and accessing the Vatterott Training Institute. If at any point you need help, pleaase visit hopeignites.org/help.

steps.title: Install Edge & Set Up Your Account
steps._comment_example: This step demonstrates device type + OS variants (byod_mac, org_mac, etc.)

byod_pc.description: Download and install Microsoft Edge, then sign in with your temporary credentials to set your permanent password and configure two factor authentication.
notes: Download the installer from the button above and run the .exe file
Sign in with your @hopeignites.org address and the temporary password from your account creation email
You will be prompted to set a new permanent password immediately — do this before anything else
Next, set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) — have your phone ready for the Microsoft Authenticator app
Set Edge as your default browser: Settings → Default browser → Make default
Microsoft Edge is our recommended browser for the best experience with Microsoft 365 apps and services

org_pc.description: Microsoft Edge should already be installed on your organization computer. Open it, sign in with your temporary credentials, and follow the prompts to set your permanent password and configure two factor authentication.
notes: Open the Start menu and search for 'Microsoft Edge' — it should already be installed
Go to Settings → Help & feedback → About Microsoft Edge to make sure Edge is up to date
Sign in with your @hopeignites.org address and the temporary password from your account creation email
You will be prompted to set a new permanent password immediately — do this before anything else
Next, set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) — have your phone ready for the Microsoft Authenticator app
Set Edge as your default browser: Settings → Default browser → Make default
Microsoft Edge is our recommended browser for the best experience with Microsoft 365 apps and services

byod_mac.description: Download and install Microsoft Edge on your personal Mac, then sign in with your temporary credentials to set your permanent password and configure MFA.
notes: Download the .pkg installer (linked above) and follow the installation prompts
Once installed, open Edge and sign in with your @hopeignites.org address and the temporary password from your account creation email
You will be prompted to set a new permanent password immediately — do this before anything else
Next, set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) — have your phone ready for the Microsoft Authenticator app
Set Edge as your default browser: System Settings → Desktop & Dock → Default web browser → Microsoft Edge
Microsoft Edge is our recommended browser for the best experience with Microsoft 365 apps and services

org_mac.description: Microsoft Edge may already be installed on your organization Mac. If not, download and install it, then sign in with your temporary credentials.
notes: Check if Edge is already installed by searching for it in Spotlight (Cmd+Space)
If not installed, download the .pkg installer and follow the installation prompts
Once installed, open Edge and sign in with your @hopeignites.org address and the temporary password from your account creation email
You will be prompted to set a new permanent password immediately — do this before anything else
Next, set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) — have your phone ready for the Microsoft Authenticator app
Set Edge as your default browser: System Settings → Desktop & Dock → Default web browser → Microsoft Edge
Microsoft Edge is our recommended browser for the best experience with Microsoft 365 apps and services

linux.description: Install Microsoft Edge, then sign in with your temporary credentials to set your permanent password and configure MFA.
notes: Choose your package format: .deb (Ubuntu/Debian) or .rpm (Fedora/RHEL/openSUSE)
Debian/Ubuntu: Run 'sudo dpkg -i microsoft-edge-stable_*.deb' after downloading
Fedora/RHEL: Run 'sudo rpm -i microsoft-edge-stable-*.rpm' after downloading
Once installed, open Edge and sign in with your @hopeignites.org address and the temporary password from your account creation email
You will be prompted to set a new permanent password immediately — do this before anything else
Next, set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) — have your phone ready for the Microsoft Authenticator app
Microsoft Edge is our recommended browser for the best experience with Microsoft 365 apps and services

steps.title: Set Up Microsoft Teams
steps.description: Install Microsoft Teams to connect and collaborate with your Hope Ignites colleagues.
notes: Sign in with your @hopeignites.org account
Teams is used for messaging, video calls, and team collaboration across Hope Ignites
Download the desktop app for the best experience — it works better than the browser version
Enable notifications so you don't miss important messages
Download the Teams installer from the button above and run the .exe file
Sign in with your @hopeignites.org Microsoft 365 account
Teams may already be installed if your machine was set up by Technology Services — check the Start menu first
Pin Teams to your taskbar for quick access
Enable channel notifications in Teams settings so you don't miss messages
Download the Teams .pkg installer and follow the installation prompts
Teams is also available on the Mac App Store
Sign in with your @hopeignites.org Microsoft 365 account
Allow Teams to send notifications when prompted — this is important for staying connected
Enable channel notifications in Teams settings so you don't miss messages
Download the .deb (Ubuntu/Debian) or .rpm (Fedora/RHEL) package from the button above
Debian/Ubuntu: Run 'sudo dpkg -i teams-linux_*.deb' to install
Fedora/RHEL: Run 'sudo rpm -i teams-linux-*.rpm' to install
Alternatively, use Teams in Edge at teams.microsoft.com — it works well on Linux
Sign in with your @hopeignites.org Microsoft 365 account
Enable channel notifications in Teams settings so you don't miss messages

steps.title: Setup Outlook Mobile and Desktop
steps.description: Install and configure Outlook on your devices to stay connected on the go.
notes: Download Outlook mobile app from the App Store or Google Play
For desktop, Outlook comes with Microsoft 365
Sign in with your @hopeignites.org email address

mac.description: Install and configure Outlook on your Mac and mobile devices to stay connected.
notes: Download Outlook for Mac from the Mac App Store or via the Microsoft 365 portal
Download the Outlook mobile app from the App Store on your iPhone
Sign in with your @hopeignites.org email address
On Mac, go to System Settings → Internet Accounts to also add your account to Apple Mail as a backup

pc.description: Install and configure Outlook on your Windows PC and mobile devices to stay connected.
notes: Outlook for Windows is included with your Microsoft 365 subscription — open the Start menu and search for Outlook
Download the Outlook mobile app from Google Play or the App Store
Sign in with your @hopeignites.org email address
Pin Outlook to your taskbar for quick access

linux.description: Access your email via Outlook on the web or configure a desktop mail client on your Linux machine.
notes: Outlook desktop is not available for Linux — use Outlook on the web at outlook.office.com
For a native experience, you can also configure Thunderbird with your @hopeignites.org account using IMAP/SMTP
Download the Outlook mobile app from Google Play or the App Store
Sign in with your @hopeignites.org email address

steps.title: Access Your Training Plan on the Vatterott Training Institute (LMS)
steps.description: Start your Training Plan with an introduction to the technology tools on the Vatterott Training Institute, our learning management system.
steps.buttonIcon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='20' height='20' fill='#cecece'><path d='M12 3L1 9l11 6 9-4.91V17h2V9L12 3z'/><path d='M5 13.18v4L12 21l7-3.82v-4L12 17l-7-3.82z'/></svg>
notes: You'll receive guidance from Network Headquarters and/or your local training administrator inviting you to complete the training plan assigned to you.
You can find all your assigned training on the Training Dashboard.
Contact your supervisor or Hope Ignites Technology Services if you have questions about required training

steps.title: Onboarding Call with Network Headquarters
steps.description: Schedule and complete your onboarding call with the Network Headquarters team.
notes: Additional details to be provided by Julie
This call will help you get acquainted with the Network Headquarters team and processes

steps.title: Review the Hope Ignites Policy Manual
steps.description: All new employees should review the Policy Manual to understand organizational policies and procedures.
steps.buttonIcon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='20' height='20' fill='currentColor'><path d='M14 2H6c-1.1 0-1.99.9-1.99 2L4 20c0 1.1.89 2 1.99 2H18c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V8l-6-6zm2 16H8v-2h8v2zm0-4H8v-2h8v2zm-3-5V3.5L18.5 9H13z'/></svg>
notes: The policy review is required for all new employees
Take your time to read through each section carefully
Contact Human Resources if you have questions about any policies
